spec.name: A Shaded Path Through The Forest
spec.description: You are at a turn on a small shaded path winding through the trees. The forest gradually becomes more dense to the west. The path continues west and south from here.

south.description: Through the trees to the south you can almost see the main trail leading back to Midgaard.

west.description: The path winds its way between the trees.

extra_descs.description: The shadowed path is probably used by the small animals living in the forest.
The trees are mostly young oaks and tall beeches.
